metadata.title: next-template
metadata.description: Base template: Next.js, auth, Postgres, and Docker pre-wired.

home.title: next-template
home.subtitle: A pre-wired starting point for new projects: auth, a real database, and Docker already configured so you can skip the setup and start building.
home.seeRoutes: See every page this template ships with →

auth.title: Auth built in
auth.description: Email/password login with Better Auth, sessions, and a protected route example.

database.title: Real database
database.description: Postgres + Drizzle ORM, schema and migrations ready to extend.

docker.title: Runs in Docker
docker.description: App and database both containerized — clone, migrate, and go.

login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Sign in to your account to continue

register.title: Create an account
register.subtitle: It only takes a minute to get started
register.name: Name

forgotPassword.title: Forgot password
forgotPassword.subtitle: We'll email you a link to reset it.
forgotPassword.sent: If that email exists, a reset link is on its way. Check your inbox.

resetPassword.title: Reset password
resetPassword.subtitle: Choose a new password for your account.
resetPassword.success: Password reset. Sign in with your new password.
resetPassword.invalidToken: This reset link is invalid or expired.

validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters

account.title: Account
account.subtitle: Manage your profile, password, and account.

password.title: Password
password.subtitle: Changing your password signs you out of other sessions.

danger.title: Delete account
danger.subtitle: This permanently deletes your account. There is no undo.

validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters

notes.title: Notes
notes.subtitle: Example CRUD resource — schema, API route, api-client, and TanStack Query/Table wired together. Delete this page once you don't need the reference anymore.

routes.title: Routes
routes.subtitle: Every page and API route this template ships with.
routes.home: Landing page with the stack overview and get-started/sign-in CTAs.
routes.resetPassword: Set a new password from the emailed reset link (?token=).
routes.dashboard: Protected page — redirects to /login without a session.
routes.account: Protected page — update profile, change password, delete account.
routes.notes: Protected page — example CRUD resource (schema, API route, api-client, TanStack Query/Table).
routes.admin: Admin-only page — redirects non-admins. Lists every user via Better Auth's admin plugin.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or was moved.

error.label: Error
error.title: Something went wrong
error.description: An unexpected error occurred. Try again, or head back home.
